'''Voor''' was a [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Lieutenant Voor served on the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Relentless (Dorja)|''Relentless'']] under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ranif Parlan|Parlan]] around [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Parlan discovered that Republican tactician [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]] was alive, hiding on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. He ordered a bounty on his head, calling the attention of bounty hunter [[Jodo Kast]] and others.<ref name="TM" />

Voor discovered that one of Parlan's officers, [[Ensign/Legends|Ensign]] [[Dana (Rebel Alliance)|Dana]], was really an agent for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Dana tried to escape to [[Kwenn Space Station/Legends|Kwenn Space Station]] to report Tallon's survival to the Alliance, but was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jodo Kast]]. Voor and [[Unidentified female bounty hunter|two]] [[Unidentified bounty hunter (scaly humanoid)|other]] bounty hunters were present when an Alliance team attempted to meet with Dana. The trio were defeated, and Dana's body recovered, upon which they found a [[Datapad/Legends|data storage pad]] containing the information regarding Tallon.<ref name="TM" />
